title: Lorca Oviedo
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Lorca}} {{Character |type=CIS |image=[[File:Lorca_Oviedo.jpg]] |name=Lorca Oviedo |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]{{Tales|22|Honor Bound}}'s events, which include Lorca Oviedo's [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], are set approximately a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the events of {{Film|II}} and therefore around [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{Tales|22|Honor Bound}} |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Gray]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Oviedo Engineering]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]{{DB|organization|cis|Confederacy of Independent Systems}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Their motherless, vat-grown killers will walk into ambush after ambush without a clue as to how or why they're being culled.|Director General Lorca Oviedo, referring to the clones of the Grand Army of the Republic|}} '''Lorca Oviedo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as the [[Director/Legends|director]] of [[Oviedo Engineering]], a corporation that built military [[Weapon/Legends|weaponry]], holding the title of [[Director General]]. Around [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], the director allied himself with the Separatist [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the Republic's opponent in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. As the Republic [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate's]] members believed the Director General was a Separatist, he and Separatist [[Foreman/Legends|Foreman]] [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]] prepared an [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] attempt on the director in an attempt to establish that Oviedo was not a Separatist. After a [[Conference on Aviles Prime|conference]] on the astronomical object [[Aviles Prime]], a group of Republic [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] was tasked with escorting Oviedo's [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] to the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]; however, while traveling to Coruscant, the Director General [[Death/Legends|executed]] his crew and brought his [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] as Separatist [[Warship/Legends|warships]] shot down the Republic vessels. After the cruiser and its escort crashed on the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Asturias]], Oviedo spoke with Tambor via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]]. Several [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] who had survived the crash located the director and Tambor [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] his forces to leave no witnesses. The [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] captured the Director General and escaped Asturias with Oviedo's cruiser, bringing him to Coruscant, where he died of respiratory failure. ==Biography== ===A traitorous plot=== {{Quote|You will return in triumph! A hero of the Republic! The illustrious Lorca Oviedo—Director General of the Oviedo Engineering dynasty.|Foreman Wat Tambor, to Director General Lorca Oviedo|}} A [[Human/Legends|Human]], Lorca Oviedo was the [[Director General]] of the military [[Weapon/Legends|weaponry]] manufacturer{{CSWECite|II|432|Oviedo Engineering}} [[Oviedo Engineering]]. Around [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Oviedo served the latter government. After he allied himself with the Confederacy, rumors of his questionable loyalty circulated in the Republic [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. As the Senate prepared to pass a [[Republic military enhancement bill/Legends|rearmament mandate]], Separatist [[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]] [[Foreman/Legends|Foreman]]''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]'' [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]] and Oviedo designed a plot to establish that the Director General was loyal to the Republic by executing a Separatist [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] attempt on Oviedo in an attempt to prompt the Senate to task Oviedo Engineering with equipping the Republic's [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] with vehicles and munitions. Tambor sought to use that task to extrapolate the Republic's military strength and deployment patterns. [[File:LorcaWat-HB.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Director General Lorca Oviedo speaks with Foreman Wat Tambor.]] After attending a [[Conference on Aviles Prime|conference]] on the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Aviles Prime system/Legends|Aviles Prime system]] astronomical object [[Aviles Prime]], Oviedo traveled aboard a Republic [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] with an escort of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] and their two [[CR25 troop carrier/Legends|CR25 troop carriers]] to the Republic's [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Coruscant system]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]{{DB|location|coruscant|Coruscant}} [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. While traveling to Coruscant, Oviedo's crew was [[Death/Legends|executed]] and his vessel dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] as a [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Droid Control Ship]] and its [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droids]] attacked the Republic [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] and the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos']] [[Troop carrier/Legends|troop carriers]]. The Separatist forces' attack destroyed one of the troop [[Carrier/Legends|carriers]] and sent the remaining Republic vessels crashing down to the Expansion Region{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Asturias system/Legends|Asturias system]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Asturias]]. Oviedo survived the crash and, surrounded by [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]], left his ship and spoke with Tambor, to Oviedo's dismay, via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] while the clones that had survived the crash discovered that the Director General's crew had been executed after boarding the Consular cruiser. ===No survivors=== {{Quote|One other thing. Should there be even the remotest possibility of them getting off-world, kill Director Oviedo immediately…his silence will be of greater worth than his complicity.|Foreman Wat Tambor, to his battle droid forces|}} The foreman remarked that after one or two [[Standard day/Legends|days]], the Republic would rescue Oviedo and the Senate's suspicions regarding the Director General's loyalty would disappear, allowing the government to pass the rearmament mandate. While Oviedo expressed that he was uneasy about their plot, as he believed that the Republic [[Army/Legends|Army's]] [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] commanders would not be fooled so easily, the clones [[Action on Asturias|attacked]] the Director General's [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] forces. As the commandos captured Oviedo, Tambor commanded the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] to leave no survivors and kill Oviedo should there be the slightest possibility of the clones fleeing Asturias. [[File:OviedoSeparatistShock-HB.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Director General Lorca Oviedo was shocked when he realized that the Separatists sought to murder him.]] While the clones and the Director General walked to Oviedo's cruiser, Oviedo offered to employ them as his [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]], promising that they could benefit from his patronage; however, the clones declined the [[Director/Legends|director's]] offer, as they had already seen how he treated those loyal to him. Once the group arrived at the Consular's location, Separatist [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]] fired at the clones. Several clones died to the attackers' [[Laser/Legends|laserfire]], but two—[[RC-1080]] and [[Zag]]—survived the attack, bringing Oviedo to his cruiser. Faced by B1s that sought to murder him, Oviedo was shocked when they attacked him before they were destroyed by the clones. The group then boarded the Consular and left Asturias, bringing the [[Treason/Legends|traitorous]] Director General to Coruscant. Before he could be interrogated, Oviedo died of respiratory failure on Coruscant. Zag later recounted the events on Asturias to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]]{{Film|V}}{{CSWECite|III|330|Mace Windu}} [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] in Coruscant's [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. The clone believed that if the Director General claimed that the commando's report was false, that he could be condemning himself, prompting Yoda to tell him that Oviedo had died of respiratory failure. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You're all going to die here, you know, but it doesn't have to be this way…I have a proposition for you and your men. Join me, become my personal bodyguard. Become individuals. Try living your own lives for once! I am not without wealth or influence. You could benefit greatly from my patronage!''"
"''We have already seen how you treat those loyal to you.|Director General Lorca Oviedo and a clone commando|}} Lorca Oviedo believed that the members of his clone commando escort were nothing but killing machines, who would not be remembered after their death, offering to employ them as his bodyguards so that they could become "individuals" and live their own lives. He attempted to manipulate them into not following their orders to bring him to Coruscant by remarking that he possessed wealth and influence. Oviedo characterized the Republic's clone troopers as "[[Parent/Legends|motherless]], [[Cloning tank|vat]]-grown killers." Foreman Tambor characterized Oviedo as "illustrious." The Director General had [[Color/Legends|light gray]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], light skin, blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and a graying beard. ==Skills and abilities== {{Quote|''Uhff…Uhff''—Slow down! I—I can't keep up!|Director General Lorca Oviedo|}} Lorca Oviedo could not keep up with the clones' walking speed. ==Equipment== Oviedo wore some purple and green [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] covered by a [[Cloak/Legends|cloak]] attached to his clothing with a golden connector. ==Behind the scenes== Director General Lorca Oviedo first appeared in the flashbacks of the short story "[[Honor Bound]]," which was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[February 23]], [[2005]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/10-154/Star-Wars-Tales-22|text=STAR WARS TALES #22}} as part of the [[Star Wars Tales 22|twenty-second]] issue of the ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' series. The issue was written by [[Ian Edginton]] and illustrated by [[Steve Pugh]]. ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], erroneously states that Oviedo was arrested on conspiracy charges after faking his death and plotting to sell rigged weaponry to Tambor and the Separatists. Oviedo shares his last name with [[Wikipedia:Oviedo|Oviedo]], the capital city of the{{WebCite|url=https://www.visitoviedo.info|text=Visita Oviedo - oviedo.es|language=[[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]]|archivedate=20220305141646 }} [[Wikipedia:Spain|Spanish]] region{{WebCite|url=https://www.collinsdictionary.com/es/diccionario/ingles/asturias|text=Asturias definición y significado|work=Collins Dictionary|language=[[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]]|archivedate=20161022104544}} of [[Wikipedia:Asturias|Asturias]]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Lorca Oviedo}} *{{Tales|22|Honor Bound}} {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== *{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection|packtype=''Star Wars'' Comic Pack|pack=#16: Clone Commando and Super Battle Droid (''Star Wars Tales'' #22)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TACcomicpacks16.asp}} *{{CSWECite|multiple}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pl=Lorca Oviedo }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oviedo, Lorca}} [[Category:Business owners and executives]] [[Category:Confederacy of Independent Systems individuals]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Oviedo Engineering]]
